data-v-ce8e1029=""><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" class="author-avatar" data-v-ce8e1029=""><div class="article-info__right" data-v-ce8e1029=""><div class="author-name" data-v-ce8e1029="">BingX</div><div class="publish-time" data-v-ce8e1029="">2025-04-16 11:27</div></div></div><div class="article-body" data-v-ce8e1029=""><h3 id="h_01JRZ5434ENCGZ10ZTPY4PPMW6">1. Smart Audit Channel</h3><p>This service is available to all users. All applications will be reviewed by the system with immediate results.</p><p> </p><p><strong>How to apply via the Smart Audit Channel?</strong></p><p>Visit the trader application page (<a rel="nofollow" href="https://bingx.com/CopyTrading/apply?from=1">click here >></a>). Scroll down to find the "How to Apply" section.</p><p> </p><p><strong>Step1: Choose a Copy Trading Account</strong></p><p>Select an account for the system to review: Standard Futures or Perpetual Futures</p><p>To choose an account, please refer to: <a rel="nofollow" href="https://bingx.com/support/articles/12367915528601/">Overview of Copy Trading Parameters</a></p><p>Note: The smart audit channel does not support Spot Account application. However, after successful application, traders can choose from any of the following accounts to share trades: Standard Futures, Perpetual Futures, and Spot Account.<br><br><strong>Step 2: Fulfill the evaluation criteria</strong></p><p><strong>Evaluation Criteria for Standard/Perpetual Futures:</strong></p><p>1. Standard/Perpetual Futures Account Assets ≥ 110 USDT</p><p>The statistics of Account Assets exclude unrealized PnL.</p><p>2. Standard/Perpetual Futures 30D Win Ratio ≥ 40%</p><p>The "30D Win Ratio" is calculated based on all the data of your Standard/Perpetual Futures trades in the past 30 days up to the moment you click "Apply Now". If you do not have any trading activities for the last 30 days, the application will not be approved.</p><p>30D Win Ratio = No. of profitable orders (net profit) in the last 30 days / Total no. of orders in the last 30 days</p><p><em>*No. of profitable orders (net profit) refers to the profit amount of orders that remain positive after deducting trading fees and funding fees.</em></p><p>3. Standard/Perpetual Futures 30D Trading Frequency ≥ 3 times</p><p>The "30D Trading Frequency" is calculated based on the number of your Standard/Perpetual Futures trades in the past 30 days up to the moment you click "Apply Now". The number of trades is determined by the number of closed positions. If there are no more than three closed positions for the last 30 days, the application will not be approved.</p><p> </p><p><strong>Step 3: Read and tick the box "OK (Copy Trading Customer Agreement)", then click on "Apply Now". Your application will be automatically reviewed with immediate results.</strong></p><p><img src="https://bingxservice.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/13432844885903" alt="20250804-162523.jpeg" width="671" height="578"></p><ul>
<li data-list-item-id="e1fa94fed655b531884870954b5b12b0f">If your application is approved, a pop-up window will appear on the application page indicating "Success". <a rel="nofollow" href="https://bingx.com/support/articles/11258311333007">Traders | Onboarding Guide >></a>
</li>
<li data-list-item-id="e535cb919f4e586fc767cd37f11ae63d8">In the case that your application is rejected, a pop-up window will appear on the application page indicating the reason for rejection. You're advised to adjust your trading activities based on the reason and apply again. There is no limit to how many times you can apply.</li>
</ul><h3 id="h_01JRZ5F5P1GQDBK2A2A9FGAPYB">2. KOL Express Channel</h3><p>The KOL Express Channel is designed to facilitate the application of traders who have a certain fan base.</p><p> </p><p><strong>How to apply via the KOL Express Channel?</strong></p><p>KOL Express Channel (<a rel="nofollow" href="https://bingx.com/CopyTrading/apply/kol/">Access>></a>)</p><p>Please ensure that you meet the following criteria before proceeding with this application channel.</p><p><strong>1. Social media followers (Meet any requirement below)</strong></p><ul>
<li data-list-item-id="e23c15622ae09050599725ba09dc7ed8c">X followers ≥ 100</li>
<li data-list-item-id="e36c8e33a82e10e490cc538cdddf64ebb">Facebook followers ≥ 100</li>
<li data-list-item-id="e5a79f48e5c58034f2e30dedfcb5989ca">TradingView followers ≥ 100</li>
<li data-list-item-id="e19fb3686d6d24ff7827853ed3e65e5bc">Telegram group members ≥ 100</li>
</ul><p><strong>2. Copy Trading Assets ≥ 1,000 USDT</strong></p><ul><li data-list-item-id="e95e28fbe1f01e2c462d8d03c82ff95c5">Total assets of all BingX accounts ≥ 500 USDT</li></ul><p> </p><p><strong>Step 1: Submit your main social media platform</strong></p><p>If your platform is not listed in the options, you can provide your social media link and screenshot in any of the columns, and we will review your case accordingly.</p><p><strong>Step 2: Submit the screenshot of the number of your social media followers.</strong></p><p><strong>Step 3: Read and tick the box before "OK (Copy Trading Customer Agreement)", then click on "Apply Now". You will receive the application result within 24 hours after submission.</strong></p><p><em>*Each user can only submit one application per month via the KOL Express Channel. Therefore, please ensure that you filled in the required information correctly and meet the criteria on account assets. Once your application is submitted, please avoid copying any trader in Copy Trading. Otherwise, your application will fail to pass the review.</em></p><p><em>The successful application result will be delivered to you via push notification.In the case that your application is rejected, you will receive a push notification on the failure reason. You're advised to revise your application based on the reason and submit it again a month later or submit it at any time via the smart audit method.</em></p><p> </p><p><strong>Please Note:</strong></p><ul>
<li data-list-item-id="e08b84d45098e23d0b57f05cce79a38ad">You cannot apply through the smart audit channel when your "KOL Express Channel" application is under review.</li>
<li data-list-item-id="ecae6a3a9f5988d42cf92ed401ed6ff47">You will be prohibited from copying the orders of other traders once your application is approved.</li>
</ul><p> </p><h3 id="h_01JRZ5JNX29XX9PDFSFRYJDRB4">3. FAQs</h3><p><strong>1. When can I apply again after a failed application?</strong></p><p>The smart audit channel doesn't impose any limit on the application times or intervals. If your application fails to be approved, you can submit another application at any time. The KOL Express Channel restricts the application to once per month. You're advised to use this channel carefully.</p><p><strong>2. Can I switch between private and public copy trading?</strong></p><p>Yes.</p><p><strong>3. Which Copy Trading mode supports API trading?</strong></p><p>The copy-by-position mode (Perpetual Futures) supports API trading.</p><p>Perpetual Futures API document: <a rel="nofollow" href="https://bingx-api.github.io/docs/zh-hk/swap/introduce.html">https://bingx-api.github.io/docs/swap/introduce.html</a></p><p><strong>4. For social media platforms not listed above, how many followers must I have to qualify for the KOL Express Channel?</strong></p><p>To improve your success chance, it's advised to provide a platform where you have over 500 fans for the application.</p><p> </p><p><br><strong>Contact Us</strong></p><p>BingX exclusive trader support on Telegram: <a rel="nofollow" href="https://t.me/BingXMax" target="_blank" data-eleid="3" data-lark-is-custom="true" data-lark-link="true">@BingXMax</a></p><p>Suggestions & Feedback on our features: <a rel="nofollow"
